sentences: The patient continues on cardiac medication for dilated cardiomyopathy.
The patient was discharged without any complaints of discomfort, and regular check-ups are recommended.
The patient was initially treated with amiodarone, digoxin, carvedilol, ramipril, and warfarin to manage his palpitations.

Conventional G-banding karyotyping indicated a karyotype of 46,XX,del (7) (q21q22). Repeat karyotyping using the infant's peripheral blood indicated a karyotype of 46,XX,del (7) (q21.13q22.1), identical to the results obtained from prenatal amniotic fluid sampling.
The patient will follow up with her physician for monitoring of her metastatic breast carcinoma.
The patient underwent tumor resection and the surgical specimen was reported as ARMS after pathological evaluation. Post-surgery, the patient received combination chemotherapy.
The patient revealed the gradual development of temporal alopecia, fine facial hair, and hair growth on her arms and upper back, as well as deepening and hoarseness of her voice.

The patient was treated with appropriate medications for schistosomiasis and Blastocystis spp. found in stool samples. The patient was also instructed to follow up with a urologist for further evaluation and management of the urinary schistosomiasis.
Laboratory analysis showed 12% eosinophilia, and stool examination detected the presence of S. mansoni eggs. The anatomopathological examination confirmed the diagnosis of schistosomiasis.
Follow-up appointments with the treating physician and required specialists recommended. The patient was advised to follow lifestyle modifications and dietary changes to manage his comorbidities.

Various causes of hypercalcemia were excluded including primary hyperparathyroidism, hyperthyroidism, malignancy, sarcoidosis, tuberculosis, and granulomatous diseases. Syndrome of apparent mineralocorticoid excess (SAME) was considered as a possible diagnosis

It is recommended that the patient undergoes regular follow-up examinations to ensure that there are no signs of the disease returning. It is also recommended that the patient adopt a healthy lifestyle, including a balanced diet and regular physical exercise, to maintain their overall health.

widgetData.source_sentence: What were the findings of the patient's ocular examination?
sentences: The patient was diagnosed with a myopic fundus in the right eye with no breaks, chorioretinal atrophy, and a tilted disc with no visible cup. The left eye had a detached retina with PVR involving the macula.
The patient presented to the glaucoma services for assessment of anterior segment findings.
Therapeutic hypothermia was administered to prevent hypoxic brain damage. V-V ECMO maintenance and PMX-DHP were conducted to prevent further development of cytokine storm.
